approved_themes.theme: AI Tools That Actually Make You Money
5 ChatGPT Prompts That Save Hours Every Week
Morning Routine That Changed My Income
Beginner Investing: $200/Month Is Enough to Build Wealth
How to Double Your Freelance Rate Without Losing Clients
Time Blocking: Do More in 4 Hours Than Most Do in 8
How to Grow on Threads in 2026 (Honest Creator Breakdown)

improvement_directives: All posts in English only — natural, conversational English (contractions OK, no overly formal tone)
Opening line must include a specific number, reader pain point, or bold claim
Each theme requires 2 variants: A/B test question-hook vs statement-hook
Use emojis as list markers (checkmark, arrow, bullet) for visual scannability
End every post with a soft CTA: save this, try this today, or a question to spark comments
Keep posts under 200 words — tight and punchy, no filler sentences
Hashtags: 5-7 English tags combining topic + action + audience
Avoid half-width double quotes in body text — use single quotes or no quotes
Tone: peer-to-peer, empowering, not preachy or guru-like
